files.sudoers:
Defaults env_reset
alice ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/id, ALL
bob ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/id, PASSWD: ALL

authorized_keys.carol:
# key rotated out by access team
@revoked ssh-ed25519 AAAAcarol carol@lab

sshd_config.d.10-base.conf:
PermitRootLogin no
PasswordAuthentication no
KbdInteractiveAuthentication no
